The Flash (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $108,167,507Details
International Box Office $163,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $271,467,507
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,934,362
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,529,033
Total $7,463,395
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Barry Allen, AKA The Flash pushes the limits of his superpowers in the DC Super Hero’s first-ever standalone feature film.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$55,043,679 (50.9% of total gross)
Legs:1.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,234 opening theaters/4,256 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $118,252,598

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
June 16th, 2023 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: June 13th, 2023 (Wide), released as The Flash (闪电侠) (China)
June 14th, 2023 (Wide), released as The Flash (閃電俠) (Taiwan)
June 14th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
June 14th, 2023 (Wide) (Indonesia)
June 14th, 2023 (Wide), released as The Flash (플래시) (South Korea)
Video Release: July 18th, 2023 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, some strong language and partial nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2775 (cert #54094), 3/22/2023)
Running Time: 144 minutes
Franchise: DC Extended Universe, The Flash, Batman, Supergirl
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell
Character Appearance: Batman, Superman
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Double Dream, The Disco Factory, DC Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
